case_title: ROGER L. MEREDITH VS. FRANCISCO SUAREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,570.70 FILED BY MEREDITH, ROGER L. AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEREDITH, ROGER L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUAREZ, FRANCISCO $6,570.70 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,720.70, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SUAREZ, FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR APR-08-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
